title: Calpurnia robinioides
taxonomy: Calpurnia robinioides is classified in the plant kingdom as a member of the Fabaceae family, commonly known as legumes. This classification is due to the plant's characteristics, including its flowers and seed pods. More specifically, Calpurnia robinioides is a genus within the Fabaceae family.
